about.title: Technical depth, product awareness and clean execution.
about.intro: I’m most valuable where backend complexity meets product pressure: services have to scale, delivery has to stay calm, and architecture needs to remain understandable.

experience.title: Work shaped around systems, ownership and delivery.
experience.summary: From enterprise backend modernization to multi-market product platforms, my path has been consistently close to systems that matter in production.

projects.title: A mix of enterprise delivery and product-minded side builds.
projects.summary: The strongest signal is not the number of technologies. It’s the ability to ship systems that solve real operational or product problems.

skills.title: Grouped by how I actually work, not as a flat logo cloud.

contact.title: Open to product teams that value strong backend ownership.
